exercises.title: Box Breathing
exercises.summary: Equal-count breathing to calm your nervous system.

exercises.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
exercises.summary: Powerful technique to fall asleep faster.
steps: Lie down, tongue behind front teeth.

exercises.title: Physiological Sigh
exercises.summary: Fastest way to lower stress in seconds.
steps: Take a second short inhale on top.

exercises.title: Coherent Breathing
exercises.summary: Slow 5-5 breathing to balance your system.

exercises.title: Alternate-Nostril Breathing
exercises.summary: Switching nostrils to clear the mind.
steps: Close right nostril, inhale left 4 sec.

exercises.title: Belly Breathing
exercises.summary: Deep belly breathing to lower baseline stress.
steps: Exhale through pursed lips — belly falls.

exercises.title: Pursed-Lip Breathing
exercises.summary: Slows breathing when you feel breathless.
steps: Pucker lips like blowing a candle.

exercises.title: Lion's Breath
exercises.summary: Release jaw tension with a forceful exhale.
steps: Sit on heels, hands on knees.

exercises.title: Wim Hof Breathing
exercises.summary: Energizing breathwork rounds with breath holds.
steps: Sit or lie on a soft surface.
Exhale and hold as long as comfortable.

exercises.title: Three-Part Breath
exercises.summary: Fill belly, ribs, chest — then reverse.

exercises.title: Sitali Cooling Breath
exercises.summary: Tongue-curl breath that cools and calms heat.
steps: Curl the tongue into a tube (or purse lips).
Inhale slowly through the curled tongue, 4 sec.
Close mouth, exhale through nose, 6 sec.

exercises.title: Bhastrika (Bellows Breath)
exercises.summary: Quick energizing pumps when you feel sluggish.
steps: Forceful inhale + exhale through nose (1 sec each).

exercises.title: Resonant 5.5 Breathing
exercises.summary: Paced breathing tuned to maximize HRV.
steps: Sit relaxed, soft gaze or eyes closed.

exercises.title: Bhramari (Humming Bee)
exercises.summary: Gentle hum on each exhale to settle the mind.
steps: Sit upright, lips closed but jaw soft.
Feel the vibration in your face and chest.

exercises.title: Ujjayi (Ocean Breath)
exercises.summary: Soft throat constriction for steady, focused breath.
steps: Slightly constrict the back of the throat.
Inhale through nose with a soft ocean-like sound.
Exhale the same way, equal length.

exercises.title: Body Scan
exercises.summary: Guided attention through every body part.
steps: Bring focus to top of head.
Slowly move attention down to toes.
Notice each region without changing it.

exercises.title: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
exercises.summary: Tense and release each muscle group.
steps: Move feet → calves → thighs → up to face.

exercises.title: Safe-Place Visualization
exercises.summary: Imagine your calm, safe place in detail.
steps: Picture a place you feel safe.
Add what you see, hear, smell, feel.

exercises.title: Loving-Kindness Meditation
exercises.summary: Send kind wishes to yourself and others.
steps: Repeat: 'May I be happy and safe.' (2 min)
Send the same to a loved one.

exercises.title: Three-Line Journal
exercises.summary: Three quick lines to clear your head.
steps: Line 1: One thing on my mind.
Line 2: One thing I'm grateful for.

exercises.title: Mindful Sitting
exercises.summary: Simple breath-focused meditation.
steps: Focus on breath at the nostrils.

exercises.title: Cognitive Defusion
exercises.summary: Create distance from anxious thoughts.
steps: Restate: 'I notice I'm having the thought that ___'.
Try saying it in a silly voice.

exercises.title: Worry Window
exercises.summary: Postpone worry to a scheduled 15-min slot.
steps: Tell yourself: 'I'll think about it then'.
At the slot, sit and worry intentionally.

exercises.title: Gratitude List
exercises.summary: Five specific things you're grateful for.
steps: List 5 specific things you're grateful for.

exercises.title: Mountain Visualization
exercises.summary: Picture yourself as a steady mountain.
steps: Watch seasons pass: storms, sun, snow.

exercises.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
exercises.summary: Use your senses to anchor in the present.

exercises.title: Cognitive Shuffle
exercises.summary: Trick your brain to drift toward sleep.
steps: Lie in bed in your sleep position.
Picture random objects starting with it.
Hold each for ~5 sec, then move on.
Switch letters when you run out.

exercises.title: Self-Compassion Break
exercises.summary: Three short phrases to soften self-criticism.
steps: Place a hand over your heart.
Say: 'This is a moment of difficulty.'
Say: 'Difficulty is part of being human.'
Say: 'May I be kind to myself right now.'

exercises.title: Reframe & Plan
exercises.summary: Turn one stuck thought into a smaller next step.
steps: Write down the worry in one sentence.
Ask: 'What's the evidence for and against?'
Reframe it as a kinder, more accurate version.
Pick the smallest possible next step.
Write the step on a sticky note.

exercises.title: Color Breathing
exercises.summary: Breathe in calming color, exhale a tense one.
steps: Sit or lie down, eyes closed.
Pick a calming color (e.g., soft blue).
Inhale and imagine that color filling you.
Exhale and watch it leave your body.

exercises.title: Two-Minute Body Reset
exercises.summary: Ultra-short reset between meetings or tasks.
steps: Notice your feet on the ground.
Choose one word for the next task.

exercises.title: Sleep Wind-Down
exercises.summary: Quiet routine to signal your body it's bedtime.
steps: Dim lights to soft warm glow.
Sit in bed and stretch neck for 1 min.
Lights off, lie still and breathe slowly.

exercises.title: Anxiety Spike Protocol
exercises.summary: Stack three quick tools when anxiety surges.
steps: 30 sec cold water on wrists or face.
Say: 'I am safe in this moment.'
Take one slow walk around the room.

exercises.title: Mindful Slow Walk
exercises.summary: Walk at half-speed, anchored to your breath.

exercises.title: Neck & Shoulder Release
exercises.summary: Quick fix for desk and screen tension.

exercises.title: Full-Body Stretch
exercises.summary: Gentle stretches from head to toe.

exercises.title: Tai Chi Cloud Hands
exercises.summary: Slow, flowing weight-shifting movement.

exercises.title: Tree Posture (Qi-Gong)
exercises.summary: Stand still 'hugging a tree' to ground yourself.
steps: Arms in front, hugging a tree shape.

exercises.title: Mindful Tidying
exercises.summary: Tidy one small area for 10 minutes.
steps: Move slowly, one item at a time.

exercises.title: Foam Roll Self-Massage
exercises.summary: Roll out tight muscles to release tension.

exercises.title: Wall Stretches
exercises.summary: Gentle stretches using a wall for support.

exercises.title: Eye Yoga
exercises.summary: Quick eye exercises to relieve screen fatigue.

exercises.title: Slow Sun Salutation
exercises.summary: Beginner-friendly yoga flow.
steps: Half lift → step back to plank.

exercises.title: Desk Reset Stretch
exercises.summary: Counter-stretches for screen and chair tension.
steps: Open chest with hands behind back, 30 sec.

exercises.title: Hip Opener Series
exercises.summary: Release tight hips from sitting all day.

exercises.title: Walking Meditation
exercises.summary: Slow indoor lap focused on every step.
steps: Notice heel → ball → toe of each step.
Pause and turn at each end.

exercises.title: Spinal Mobility Flow
exercises.summary: Wake up the spine in every direction.
steps: Cat-cow on hands and knees, 1 min.

exercises.title: 10-Minute Mobility Flow
exercises.summary: All-in-one joint warm-up for a desk day.

exercises.title: Brisk Walk
exercises.summary: Walk fast enough to talk but not sing.
steps: Walk easy 3 min to warm up.

exercises.title: Light Jog
exercises.summary: Easy conversational jog with walk recovery.

exercises.title: Sun Salutation Flow
exercises.summary: Yoga flow at one breath per pose.
steps: Add Sun Salutation B for variety.

exercises.title: Bodyweight Circuit
exercises.summary: Strength + cardio with no equipment.

exercises.title: Stationary Cycling
exercises.summary: Steady cycling at moderate effort.
steps: Adjust seat — slight knee bend at bottom.

exercises.title: Dance Workout
exercises.summary: Upbeat playlist, free movement.

exercises.title: Easy Swim Laps
exercises.summary: Relaxed laps mixing strokes.

exercises.title: Hiking
exercises.summary: Trail walking with mild elevation.

exercises.title: Jump Rope
exercises.summary: Quick, effective interval cardio.
steps: Land soft on balls of feet.

exercises.title: Vinyasa Flow
exercises.summary: Yoga flow with warriors and triangle.

exercises.title: Stair Climbing
exercises.summary: Climb up, walk down — repeat.

exercises.title: Rowing Machine
exercises.summary: Steady rowing for full-body cardio.

exercises.title: Tabata Bodyweight
exercises.summary: 20s on / 10s off intervals across 4 moves.
steps: Warm up 3 min: jog in place + arm circles.
Round 3 (4 min): mountain climbers same pattern.

exercises.title: Shadow Boxing
exercises.summary: Punch combos in the air for cardio + stress relief.
steps: Warm up 2 min: shoulder rolls, light bouncing.
Stance: hands up, chin tucked, feet split.
Cool down: arm + back stretches, 2 min.

exercises.title: Kettlebell Cardio Flow
exercises.summary: Light KB circuit for breath and rhythm.
steps: 10 KB swings + 10 goblet squats + 10 KB rows (each side).

exercises.title: Elliptical Steady State
exercises.summary: Low-impact steady cardio at conversational pace.
steps: Light pole pull engages upper body.

exercises.title: Incline Treadmill Walk
exercises.summary: Brisk walk on an incline — easy on joints.
steps: Warm up 3 min flat at easy pace.
Walk 18 min, cool down 3 min flat.

exercises.title: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.summary: Heavy squat for full-body strength.
steps: Bar across upper back, feet shoulder-width.
Sit hips back and down to parallel.

exercises.title: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.summary: Lift the bar from the floor with strong hinge.
steps: Bar over mid-foot, grip outside shins.
Drop hips, lift chest, pull slack.
Push the floor away, bar close to body.

exercises.title: Bench Press
exercises.summary: Press the bar from chest to overhead.
steps: Lie flat, eyes under the bar.
Shoulder blades pinched back and down.

exercises.title: Overhead Press
exercises.summary: Press the bar from shoulders overhead.
steps: Bar at shoulders, grip just outside.
Press straight up, head moves through.

exercises.title: Pull-Ups
exercises.summary: Pull yourself up to the bar.
steps: Pull shoulder blades down and back.
Drive elbows toward ribs, chin over bar.

exercises.title: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.summary: Hip hinge to target hamstrings and glutes.
steps: Stand tall, bar in front of thighs.
Hinge hips back, bar slides down legs.

exercises.title: Bent-Over Row
exercises.summary: Row the bar to your lower ribs.

exercises.title: Goblet Squat
exercises.summary: Beginner-friendly squat with a weight at chest.
steps: Drive through whole foot to stand.

exercises.title: Dumbbell Lunges
exercises.summary: Single-leg strength with dumbbells.
steps: Dumbbell in each hand at sides.
Push through front heel to stand.

exercises.title: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.summary: Explosive hip-hinge swing.
steps: Hinge, grab kettlebell with both hands.
Snap hips to swing it to chest height.
Let it fall back, hinge again.

exercises.title: Farmer's Carry
exercises.summary: Walk holding heavy dumbbells.
steps: Pick up a heavy DB in each hand.

exercises.title: Push / Pull / Legs Plan
exercises.summary: Structured weekly program for full-body strength.
steps: Push day: bench, OHP, incline DB, raises, triceps.
Pull day: deadlift, pull-ups, rows, face pulls, curls.
Leg day: squat, RDL, lunges, calves, plank.

exercises.title: Front Squat
exercises.summary: Front-loaded squat that hammers quads and core.
steps: Bar across front delts, elbows high.
Brace core, take a big breath.
Sit straight down, knees track toes.

exercises.title: Incline Bench Press
exercises.summary: Targets upper chest and front shoulders.
steps: Pinch shoulder blades back and down.
Lower bar to upper chest, elbows ~45°.

exercises.title: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.summary: Single-leg squat with rear foot elevated.
steps: Rear foot on bench, front foot 2–3 ft ahead.
Lower until front thigh is parallel.
Drive through front heel to stand.

exercises.title: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.summary: Heavy glute lift from a bench-supported bridge.
steps: Upper back on bench, bar across hips (use pad).
Feet flat, knees bent ~90° at top.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes hard.

exercises.title: Lat Pulldown
exercises.summary: Vertical pull for lats and upper back.
steps: Grip bar slightly wider than shoulders.
Pull elbows down to ribs, chest up.

exercises.title: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.summary: Strict overhead press without lower-back strain.
steps: Sit upright on bench with back support.
Dumbbells at shoulder height, palms forward.
Press straight up until arms lock out.

exercises.title: Upper / Lower Split Plan
exercises.summary: Alternating upper and lower body sessions.
steps: Day 1 Upper: bench, row, OHP, pull-up, curls.
Day 2 Lower: squat, RDL, lunges, calves.
Day 4 Upper, Day 5 Lower (vary rep ranges).
